overview: A living 3D globe that watches the planet for fire and deforestation, notices what's new or worsening on its own, and quietly tells you what it's found.
features: 3D Earth globe with live fire and deforestation threat layers
Backend noticing engine that fetches environmental data and detects new or worsening events
Quiet severity-weighted feed that surfaces what the globe has noticed
Ambient globe drift and proactive auto-fly to the most severe recent event
Tactical instrument feel with refined HUD
